message:
fix: update DecisionRecordBuilder.build() callsites for new effective_action parameter

- Thread new 5th parameter (None) through all .build() calls across:
  decision_plane_tests.rs (3 sites), integration_tests.rs (5 sites),
  proof_harness.rs (2 sites) to match updated signature with effective_action
- Add noexec /tmp guard in from_source.rs probe_version test to skip
  gracefully when temp scripts cannot be executed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
